description: CompositionPeach, blue and red striped V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with mega sleeves and white piping around necklineFittingComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Don an edgy look with this tee from wrangler with distressed stripes.
